---
title: Task Management
description: Kanban boards, auto-tasks, and mobile checklists for your team
---

## Overview

The task system organizes operational work across your team. Cleaning, maintenance, guest preparation, and custom tasks are managed through a visual Kanban board.

## Kanban Board

Tasks are displayed in columns by status:

- **To Do** — Assigned but not started
- **In Progress** — Currently being worked on
- **Done** — Completed

Drag cards between columns to update status. Filter by property, assignee, priority, or date.

## Auto-Generated Tasks

OpenPMS automatically creates tasks based on reservation events:

- **Checkout cleaning** — Created when a guest checks out, assigned to the property's default cleaner
- **Pre-arrival preparation** — Created 1 day before check-in with a checklist (linens, toiletries, welcome items)
- **Deep cleaning** — Created after every Nth checkout (configurable)

Auto-task rules are configurable per property under Settings.

## Checklists

Each task can include a checklist with specific items to verify. Cleaners check off items as they complete them. Example cleaning checklist:

- Kitchen cleaned and restocked
- Bathrooms sanitized
- Linens changed
- Floors vacuumed and mopped
- Welcome kit placed
- Photos uploaded for verification

## Mobile View

The task interface is optimized for phone use. Team members with the **cleaner** role see only their assigned tasks in a simplified mobile layout with large tap targets and photo upload capability.

## Notifications

Task assignments and deadline reminders are sent via push notification and email. Managers receive alerts when tasks are completed or overdue.
